level_1.task: Navigate from the chair area to the table
Move from the table to the chair on the opposite side
Go around the table and reach the chair next to the entrance

level_2.task: Take notes from the table and place them on the chair
Inspect the papers on the chair and then move to the table
Pick up the pen from the table and hand it over to the person sitting on the chair

level_3.task: Collect all the documents from the chairs, organize them on the table, and then distribute to the people sitting on the chairs
Move the chair to create more space around the table, then arrange the papers on the table in order, and finally sit on the chair
Find the missing page of the report under the chairs or on the table, then complete the report on the table, and finally submit it to the person sitting on the chair
